game.short_text: Use light rays to solve egyptian puzzles and recover your memories
game.title: Trials of The Pharaoh

details.title: Trials of The Pharaoh
details.description:
An Egyptian Themed Light Ray puzzle game.
You wake up in a tomb, a female pharaoh without a name. Anubis forbids your passage into the next life, unless you can recover your memories. You must complete a series of trials to get your name into the book of the dead.
Manipulate beams of light to solve each puzzle room. With a limited amount of controls you'll need to be thoughtful about how you use them, if you want to make it into the afterlife.
Made in 10 days for GDTV Jam 2022.Read about some of the games technical details, including source code, here.
Team:
Mick Cooke - MakeFire Music   -> Music 
 
 https://youtube.com/channel/UCs75GjfGdtTS-CekMJOGICA
 
Thanos Gramosis  -> Art   
 https://www.artstation.com/tha-com-nos
 
Paul James - Wafer Audio -> Sound
 
Paulina Ramirez -  Lady Yami #3939  -> Voice Over/Writing  
https://lady-yami.itch.io/
Noam Zeise -> Programming  
 noamzeise.comWindows:
Unzip and run TrialsOfThePharaoh.exe
If you do not have vulkan drivers (running the normal executable will give you an error) then run the OpenGL build, called "TrialsOfThePharaoh-OpenGL-Build.exe"

Linux Dependancies:
libglfw3 libfreetype6 libsndfile libportaudio2
and vulkan compatible drivers for non-OGL version

game.short_text: FAST-PACED FPS CARD BATTLER! Defeat foes in the purgatory, but your only way of progression is death.
game.title: 23 Deaths From Hell

details.title: 23 Deaths From Hell
details.description:
FAST-PACED FPS CARD BATTLER! Defeat foes in the purgatory, but your only way of progression is death.
NOTE: THIS GAME IS MUCH EASIER WITH HEADPHONES
Cards- a breakdown (read these if you don’t want a learning experience)
Time- the number in blue. Shows how long the card’s cooldown is, in milliseconds 
Repetition- the number in yellow. How many times this attack repeats per use 
Damage- the number in red. Shows how much damage per attack
Durability- the number in green. Shows how many times you can use the card before it disappears 

Heres some instructions for people who cant understand:
WASD to move, SPACE to jump
ESC to pause(settings are there)
right click, left click, middle click or 1 2 3 for using cards
To start the game, destroy the totem in the middle
R to reload cards manually 
Hold shift when using cards to discard them
When you reach 0 lives, you lose



CREDITS
Game by Yollie
Music by Neverdusk
Hades' Chariot (Battle Theme 1)Seething Evil (Battle Theme 2)Muted Warmth (Menu Theme)
Additional Music by Blue Lava
Meteor Tag (Battle Theme 3)
SFX used under attribution license
Erdie for the bow sound https://freesound.org/people/Erdie/sounds/65733/
luminousfridge for the player spawn sound https://freesound.org/people/luminousfridge/sounds/496199/

game.short_text: Defeat Aomet and his minions.
game.title: Redemption in Purgatory

details.title: Redemption in Purgatory
details.description:
This game was developed during the GameDev.tv Game Jam 2022.
Redemption in Purgatory is a short game with the theme "Death is just the Beginning".  Having recently died and finding yourself at the golden gates to eternity, you have been found lacking in points to continue on.  Being an avid gamer in your earthly life, an opportunity has arisen for you to redeem the extra points needed by defeating Aomet and his followers.  There are twenty encounters to be defeated, each granting enough points to reach level 20 by the end.  
This game is a simple click and point RPG style hack and slash.  Primary gameplay is from the course RPG Core Combat that I recently completed from GameDev.TV  All game mechanics are coded in C# using Unity.
Note - the WebGl download version has larger than normal cursors.  I have fixed them so that they aren't so clunky but allows for a decent game experience in a browser without it being to distracting.  The windows download does not have this issue.

game.short_text: Atmospheric puzzle platformer
game.title: In Corporeal

details.title: In Corporeal
details.description:
Read about the development of In Corporeal here.

The controls and tutorials are in the game.

In Corporeal is an atmospheric puzzle platformer. Use unique mechanics to traverse and exit the levels in an eerie and minimalistic setting.
The game was created to be submitted as part of the GameDev.tv Game Jam 2022 (which you can find here: https://itch.io/jam/gamedevtv-jam-2022) The theme of the jam was "Death is Only the Beginning" and the length of the jam was 10 days. In Corporeal was conceptualized in the first two days, and developed on-and-off in about eight days. I was the solo developer using the Unity engine (coding in C#) and the assets listed below.
Credits for Assets Used:
Footsteps Essentials - https://assetstore.unity.com/packages/audio/sound-fx/foley/footsteps-essentials-...
Free Sound Effects Pack - https://assetstore.unity.com/packages/audio/sound-fx/free-sound-effects-pack-155...
Gothicvania Swamp - https://assetstore.unity.com/packages/2d/characters/gothicvania-swamp-152865#pub...
Cartoon FX Free - https://assetstore.unity.com/packages/vfx/particles/cartoon-fx-free-109565#publi...
Medieval Warrior Pack 2 - https://assetstore.unity.com/packages/2d/characters/medieval-warrior-pack-2-1747...
Cinematic Atmosphere Score 2 - https://pixabay.com/music/ambient-cinematic-atmosphere-score-2-22136/
Ethereal Teleport - https://freesound.org/people/Breviceps/sounds/466829/
Healing 3 (Soothing Rinse) - https://freesound.org/people/SilverIllusionist/sounds/580814/

Thank you, and good luck to all jam participants.

game.short_text: GameDev.tv Jam 2022 Entry
game.title: Better Off Dead

details.title: Better Off Dead
details.description:
This game was made for the GameDev.tv jam 2022.
https://itch.io/jam/gamedevtv-jam-2022/rate/1550362
The theme is: "Death is only the beginning".
Coded by Trev3lyan. 
Art by Althasor. 
Music by KitKat.

In Better Off Dead, you play as a skeleton brought back to the mortal plane against their will and locked away. Try to escape your corporeal form by completing 6 platformer levels. Each level introduces and challenges you with a new gameplay mechanic, resulting in a short and sweet experience.
AD or arrows to move, SPACE to jump, and P for the Pause menu.
Source code is available for download, including a readme with compilation instructions.
The windows version supports saving of levels completed and settings, the web version does not.

game.short_text: Death is Only the Beginning...
game.title: Onryō: Vengeful Spirit (Game Jam 2022)

details.title: Onryō: Vengeful Spirit (Game Jam 2022)
details.description:
A game created in 10 days for the GameDev.tv Game Jam 2022.
**UPDATE**
I have updated a second file now called Onryo GJ2022 BUILD.rar. This file is the game folder as build by unity, so download and unzip that to play the game.The second original file, Onryo.rar is the entire unity project, source code included. With the exe build inside.Screenshots have also been added
**UPDATE**

- Controls
Attack/Possess (only when orb) = X Button (PS4)A Button (Xbox)X Key(Keyboard)
Kill Host = Square Button  (PS4)X Button (Xbox)Space Bar (Keyboard)
Jump =O Button (PS4)B Button (Xbox)C Key (Keyboard)
Reload Level =Left Shoulder (PS4 and Xbox)
R (Keyboard)


Quit =Right Shoulder (PS4 and Xbox)Q (Keyboard)
- Story

It is the 16th century. A time of great turmoil. The once peaceful province of Yamato is in disrepair and rumours of a vast gang of dangerous bandits are said to roam the area, stealing from innocent victims and killing them in the process.
Their latest victim is, however, a little different... a shrine maiden.

Assume the role of a guardian spirit in search of divine retribution. Exact revenge on those who took your life by eliminating them and decide a new fate for yourself and the land.

- Inhabit any one of the gang members to defeat your enemies

- Unique controls let you switch characters when you want

- Experiment with the three hosts types to suit your playing style
- Gameplay
You start the game as the orb, and you have a life force which is slowly draining away. Hover over an enemy and press the attack/possess button to posses them. Then as that enemy rampage about the level killing other enemies.
You can kill your host at any time and fly off to find a new host, but keep an eye on the orb energy at the top left, when that's gone it's game over.
Continue until all enemies are dead

game.short_text: Use your maggot's uncharacteristic agility to find food and reach adulthood.
game.title: Maggot's Life

details.title: Maggot's Life
details.description:
*Controls*
WASD or Arrow Keys: Movement
Spacebar: Hop
Shift: Roll
R: Reset position (useful if you end up flipped on your head, or stuck)
Esc: Exit application

Flashing Lights Warning.

Entry for the 2022 GameDevTV GameJam.  5-10 minute experience.
In nature, death is only the beginning...
You have just hatched and have only one thing in mind: Feeding. However, it would seem your voracious siblings have already eaten most of the food. Thankfully, you are an unusually agile maggot, with a knack for launching yourself through the air.
Use your abilities to traverse the carcass and find something to eat. But be careful. You and your siblings aren't the only hungry creatures in the forest.-Unzip the files into a folder of your choosing.
-Execute "Maggot's Life.exe".

moreInfo.Author: Black Boar Software

(Key-binds & Accessibility option in the main menu options panel!)
In a world shrouded in shadow, monsters dwell. Monsters that have terrorized all living beings across the land. At the heart of this malice, lies a merciless vampire. She, is interested in nothing but power and will kill whoever stands in her way to attain it. She, is the source of this despair.
Rain, a hero of the people, a charismatic knight of the kingdom travels forth to rid the world of monsters. He eventually hopes to gain the strength to stop them at their source.

game.short_text: Can you maintain the essence of what you are?
game.title: Book of Life (GameDev.TV GameJam 2022 Submission)

details.title: Book of Life (GameDev.TV GameJam 2022 Submission)
details.description:
My submission for GameDev.TV Gamejam 2022
Arrows or gamepad to control
R to restart  level if you run into bugs.
The point of the game is to keep your essence moving through the food web. There should be multiple ways to do this (though I didn't have time to implement properly).
I didn't get as much finished as I would have liked, but I only started with Unity 3 months ago and this is my first 2d game in unity. Haven't made games before that since when I was a teenager making games in C++ in DOS using the Allegro engine. Also I went camping for the first three days of the jam and worked full time during the week, so you get what you get.
All artwork and code my own.
Other Assets:

You are a soul crafted to fight the death that has corrupted your world.

Curious the cat goes on a perilous journey to be able to taste fresh fish! Will you help her reach her goal before her 9 lives run out? Test your perseverance in this little game full of moments of surprise! 
- This game was made in 10 days for The GameDev.Tv Game Jam 2022 - 
DISCLAIMER: The WebGL version of the game doesn't work well with playerprefs functions and needs to be fixed.
Because of time constraints, you can expect bug fixes and updates at a later time. We still hope you will enjoy the game as it is at the present moment and that you will be able to feel the passion we poured into it. We are just at the beginning of our game developing journey but we really tried to do our best! Have fun playing the game and let us know what you think about it if you enjoyed it. :D
©Pegaselkie

game.short_text: Top-down spaceship combat game.
game.title: Project Phoenix

details.title: Project Phoenix
details.description:
Project Phoenix

Project Phoenix  is a top down spaceship combat game where you must navigate your experimental prototype battleship through a hostile asteroid field to reach a warp gate and escape to your home world with this prototype ship intact. Your enemies will overwhelm you, but you have a special advantage that will get you through the worst battles ahead!
Controls:
Mouse Axis - Move and steer the shipLeft Mouse Button - Boost or select targetRight Mouse Button - Launch a missile (mouse over them first)Mouse Wheel - Zoom camera in / outSpace Bar - Boost
Tips:
Your ship has four types of weapons: Turrets, Broadsides, Missiles, FightersEach weapon system unlocked at different upgrade tiersThere are three icons above your HUD bars indicating which weapons availableWhen available, the missile icon will light up when ready to fireAt the center of the HUD is your "phoenix gauge" showing when it can be usedFollow the blue quest markers which appear around your ship's target ring
Instructions:
Download the zip file and extract on your hard drive. Run the ProjectPhoenix.exe to play the game.
Intro cinematic:



Credits
Stimdealer - Code, UI, VFX, SFXVertex Machine (a.k.a. bOBaN) - 3D Art, Music, CinematicsAvocadoFire - Graphics, 3D Art, Voice Acting

details.title: POLTERGEIST
details.description:
The Windows version is better looking (baked lightmaps, reflection probes, Post Processing ambient occlusion), better sounding, and runs much better physics! The WebGL version... well, it runs.This is a point-and-click Poltergeist Simulator that is short but hopefully a little bit polished. I came down with COVID after Day 1, so my lofty plans were cut very short. I spent one additional day or so on it to finish it as I was recovering. Most of the jam period I spent coughing up a lung with a fever.
Full Unity Project available here (160 mb).Core scripts available here (6 mb).

details.title: Isekai Crashers
details.description:
Your profession is a professional Isekai truck driver. Save other world by crashing into protagonists !  Race against the clock every round to hit your quota of protagonist sent to the other world.  
Keys: up down left right on keyboard.

This game is my submission to GameDev.tv 2022 Game Jam !  With the theme being "Death Is Only The Beginning", I immediately gravitated to the Isekai genre. The trope is how the protagonist perishes in the real world to begin anew in another world.

details.title: Chip
details.description:
A short, atmospheric interactive fiction about discovering a lost abandoned robot with a special ability. Will the two of you become best friends... forever?


INSTRUCTIONS:
Extract everything into a folder, and run Chip.exe to play. Use your mouse to click on stuff (you can also use arrows + enter/space if you prefer). I HIGHLY recommend to have your audio on!
Game jam entry.

I decided to see if I could make this game entirely in AutoHotKey, to try something new. I also provide the source code. It's quite messy.

game.short_text: It wasn't supposed to happen, but they died anyway. What happens afterward, depends on them.
game.title: To Love an Underworld

details.title: To Love an Underworld
details.description:
A story-driven RPG Maker game. Exploring goes wrong when all you find is death. You're now in the Underworld. The locals say it's nice, but you disagree. It's time to find a way out!------------Author's note:This game is by no means complete, but it is functional. I made it in 4 days' worth of time for the occasion of a game jam with the theme  Death is only the beginning, and it has about half an hour of gameplay in it.
Perhaps one day I will come back to it and finish it. I can assure you that it's not lack of ideas that keep this project in place.
In the meanwhile, please enjoy the currently available content :)

game.title: Sacrifice

details.title: Sacrifice
details.description:
Note: due to a weird bug, characters might randomly not respawn correctly. If this happens, you  can always restart the current level with esc button.
As the prophecy foretold, the Calamity has returned, and with it, Death. To please the gods, champion after champion are sent to the Temple to pass its Trials but so far none have returned. Now, it is your turn to face the unknown that lies deep in the ancient Temple.
Chosen hero, let the sprits of the fallen guide you on your journey. Please, bring us peace.

ABOUTThis game was create by a two person team for GameDev.tv Game Jam 2022.Time: May 20th 2022 at 21:00 - May 30th 2022 23:00 (UTC)Theme: Death is only the BeginningResults:Ranked 10th in category ThemeRanked 15th in category Mechanics

game.short_text: Who knew the afterlife could be so bureaucratic?
game.title: Reaper Inc.

details.title: Reaper Inc.
details.description: Greetings new employees.Now that you've finished registering with Brenda in HR, let's go over the basics of how to be the very best Reaper you can be.When you begin, you'll see a profile of the recently decesed, including their biography, and a handful of their earthly deeds.Before you do anything else, make sure to check the criteria page for the current heavenly threshold. If the total value of a person's deeds is greater than the threshold, send them on to eternal happiness. And if not......However, before you get all trigger happy with eternal damnation, it's important to remember that some qualities in a person's profile will automatically ensure an outcome, regardless of how good or bad they've been.These rules change all the time, so be sure to check the criteria page whenever you see the notification bell.For more of a challenge, and the chance to get a higher score, you can increase the difficulty in the settings menu. Get a high enough score, and you'll be in the running for employee of the eternity.And that's it. If you need a reminder of any of our company policies, you can find them all in the help menu.Finally, I'd like to once again welcome you to Reaper Incorporated, where, in the words of Vin Diesel, "We're not just a soulless corporation. We're a family."Oh, and speaking of Vin Diesel. if you happen to get his profile during your shift, straight to heel. I don't care what the criteria says.Straight. To. Hell

game.short_text: Becoming a Zombie isn't the end. In fact, it's just the beginning! The beginning of your new life as Zombie Employees!
game.title: Dead End Job

details.title: Dead End Job
details.description:
Becoming a Zombie isn't the end. In fact, it's just the beginning!
The beginning of your new life as Zombie Employees! 
Working together with your fellow “ Zomployees”, you'll ensure all our machinery is switched on, and stay on! No one operates a dead man switch like our beloved Zomployees. 
All our Zomployees are equipped with the latest in glow in the dark Uranium rods! 

Welcome to the team!

Controls + Gameplay

Arrow or A+D keys to move Left/Right
Spacebar to Jump
Shift key (or Just Die Button) to Kill your current Zombie character, leaving the body behind.

Each Zombie can last for 30 seconds, before they expire for Uranium poisoning. Use their time wisely.
Each level has 1 or more switches which need to be turned on (and remain on) before getting to the exit zone. Leave zombie bodies on the switches to keep them on.
Watch out for hazards like spikes, acid, and more!

Known slight bugs or quirks. Occasionally the Jump button doesn't register while moving (not been able to pin down why, it's not very repeatable).
I've left in the ability to “shimmy” up walls by bashing the jump key, rather then add a feet collider. I felt it added more fun to the game :).
Credits“Dead End Job” was designed, programmed (and voiced) by me (Peter Morgan). 
This game is my entry into the GameDev.TV game jam 2022. The theme – “Death is only the beginning”.Find more great games made by me here - https://pete-morgan.itch.io
Tile art assets by Kenney - https://www.kenney.nl/assets/platformer-pack-industrial
Zombie sprite and Industrial Traps by LarryIRL - https://opengameart.org/users/larryirl
Music - Local Forecast - Elevator" by Kevin MacLeod https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5IyL1l34PIs
Text – Dead Font Walking – Chequered Inkhttps://www.dafont.com/dead-font-walking.font?l%5B%5D=10&l%5B%5D=1&text=123+Time+Z
SFX – CC0 sources, mixed and edited by myself. 

Zombie voices by me :)

Disclaimer - Please be advised that this game is a work of fiction that was created, developed, and produced by a multicultural team with various beliefs. Any similarity to real life events, incidents, and persons, living or deceased, portrayed in this game are purely coincidental.
This game is intended for mature audiences, explores horrific events and may trigger some players. Please proceed with caution. 
A submission to the Gamedev.tv 2022 game jam!
A gritty narrative adventure, where you explore the mysterious circumstances around a little girl's death. This is the first chapter in what will hopefully be a more complete experience in the future :) A tech demo if you will. It may not have a definitive feeling ending, but we're pretty happy with how it turned out :)

resultData.title: Death is just the beginning... for those left behind

game.short_text: A platform game about grief. Gamedev.tv Game Jam 2022
game.title: Death is just the beginning... for those left behind

details.title: Death is just the beginning... for those left behind
details.description:
My take on Death is Just the Beginning for Gamedev.tv Gam Jam 2022This is a simple platform game about the stages of grieving. These theme is very near to my heart as my sister died of cancer last year. The game is based on my personal experiences and memories. Bargaining didn't really resonate with me and my experiences so I replaced it with regret.  Full screen recommended
It is possible to progress through the levels in a linear fashion but much like the real thing, you can get pulled back down to a different level - although when you do, you will start further in than the last time and you will return to the level you were on when you leave it so you're never totally back to the beginning and you're always making progress, even if it doesn't always feel that way.Depression - basically a slow slog up and down steel hills and the traps slow you down more - for a short time. If you can manage it there are healthy snacks to improve how fast you recover energy (for jumping), there are unhealthy snacks to give an instant energy boost at the cost of healthDenial - everything is rainbows and cupcakes, until you see the wrong word or remember the wrong thing and then it feels like the ground has fallen out from under you. Some memories are good and give you an energy boost and a warm fuzzy feelingAnger - enemies are formless because in anger there is nothing real to direct your anger at. You feel it but there is nowhere for it to go. Exploding clears the enemies around you but they never stop coming. Having a cathartic cry can be restorativeRegret - these are the thoughts that haunt me, regret can never really be resolved because the target is gone. The barriers represent how I've felt about trying to spend time with her before she passed but not being able to because of the doctors and nurses and she had friends fly in from all over the world and we were told it would be months, so there would always be time for us another day. In the end, she had 2 weeks and 2 days from being told she was terminalAcceptance - I can't say I'm really there yet but as the final level, I wanted to share a very real memory of something that happened. I can't say I hope you enjoy the game, its not really that kind of game but I hope you appreciate it and that it makes you feel something.

moreInfo.Author: RyanH82
moreInfo.Tags: death, gamedevtv, Game Jam, grief

game.short_text: Submission for GameDevTV GameJam 2022 - Death is only the beginning
game.title: Light of a feather

details.title: Light of a feather
details.description:
Made for the GameDev.tv 2022 GameJam - Death is only the beginning.
RECOMMENDED: MOUSE & KEYBOARD
Step into ancient Egyptian mythology with this short game. You are on a journey through the realm of the dead to try and reach the field of reeds in the afterlife. Only the heart as light as a feather will achieve immortality? Find and collect all the scarab amulets to hide the sins that weigh heavy on your own heart! Will you succeed, or will the monsters get you first?

HOW TO PLAY
Search each labyrinth searching for the 5 scarabs amulets to unlock the exit.
Use your sceptre to ward off the enemies of the same colour as your magic

CONTROLS
Move using the Keyboard Arrow keys.
Target moving the Mouse around
LMB - Shoot magic
RMB - Change magic

CREDITS:
Background music from PlayOnLoop.com
Licensed under Creative Commons by Attribution 4.0
“Sound effects obtained from https://www.zapsplat.com“
Game art from Itch.io, open.game.art, Pixabay (Free version) and Canva (Free version)

Thank you for playing!
------------
Programmed by Kassie H 
Art by Gica CS

game.short_text: Guide souls into the afterlife - Watch out for demons!
game.title: The Psychopomp

details.title: The Psychopomp
details.description:
The Psychopomp
Guide souls into the afterlife!
You are The Psychopomp - a powerful entity responsible for guiding souls into the afterlife. But beware! Accursed demons lurk beyond the darkness and will consume all that they see!
Instructions
Build towers to help you achieve your goal:

Beacon Tower: Attracts nearby souls - Use this to forge a path towards the tower and redeem souls to build more towers!
Bombard Tower: Fires deadly cannonballs towards demons. Use this to protect your routes and build up a defence!
The enemy numbers will grow stronger over time, so be prepared! If your tower falls - you lose the game!

Are you ready?
GitHub

moreInfo.Author: Laurence279
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, demons, heaven, hell, Management, Real time strategy, Singleplayer, soul, Tower Defense
